description:
🕒 07:30–20:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Ecotourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-logcamp-bonomine-earlysummer/

⚠️ This tour has been closed to new registrations due to organizer circumstances.

Hike to the summit of Bonomine via the beautiful Shiratani stream route through gorge terrain, learning the basics of stream walking and enjoying the experience. Lunch and dinner feature set meals and a full dinner from a game meat restaurant, with a chance to learn about game meat cuisine.

【Fee】¥23,000 per person (includes guide fee, lunch and dinner, insurance)

【Capacity】5 people

【Guide】Tsuyoshi Shinohara (Japan Mountain Guides Association member, Mountain Guide Stage III)

【What to bring】20 ℓ backpack (with full waterproofing measures), complete stream hiking gear, change of clothes, helmet, harness, mountain hiking equipment, bus fare, bathing fee, train fare
location: 集合 西武池袋線「飯能駅」改札口
summary: Stream hiking at Bonomine and Gorge, enjoying the Naguri River Shiratani stream source walk and game meat dinner
